title: astrapaea tiliifolia
intro: Astrapaea tiliifolia, also known as the 'Dwarf Lily', is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Stemonuraceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its various medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing swelling and pain. Astrapaea tiliifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
